title: Identify Customer-Defined Calculation Types In the Overall System HMI
summary: Use the training slide content to identify which customer-defined calculation categories are documented in the Overall System HMI.
when_to_use: Use this reference when reviewing the Overall System HMI or the associated training slide to identify the documented customer-defined calculation categories shown for Customer-Defined Calculations.
not_for: Do not use this runbook to infer additional calculation types or meanings beyond the categories named in the source.
Do not use this runbook as navigation guidance for reaching the HMI calculations page, because the source does not provide detailed navigation steps.
Do not use this runbook to perform calculations, resets, or corrective actions, because the source only documents category identification.

roles_and_responsibilities.responsibility: View the Overall System HMI calculations area or training slide and identify the documented customer-defined calculation categories using the source wording only.

safety_notes: This is a reference procedure derived from training content and does not describe physical intervention or control actions.
Do not infer additional calculation types or meanings beyond the categories named in the source.
access_or_tools_needed: Access to the Overall System HMI or the training slide showing Customer-Defined Calculations
Visual access to the calculation type list

access_required: Access to the Overall System HMI or the training slide showing Customer-Defined Calculations
system_preconditions: The Customer-Defined Calculations content must be visible on the HMI or training slide.

visual_references.description: Training slide showing the Overall System HMI Customer-Defined Calculations area and the listed calculation types.

steps.title: View the Customer-Defined Calculations area
steps.purpose: Establish the correct source view for identifying the documented customer-defined calculation categories.
steps.instruction: Open or view the Overall System HMI calculations area where customer-defined calculations are shown, or use the training slide that displays this section.
steps.expected_result: The Customer-Defined Calculations area is visible for review.
steps.healthy_condition: A screen or slide is visible that shows the Customer-Defined Calculations content in the Overall System HMI context.
steps.failure_condition: The displayed HMI or training material does not show the Customer-Defined Calculations section.

actions.label: View calculations area
actions.exact_action: Open or view the Overall System HMI calculations area where customer-defined calculations are shown.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: The slide or screen view showing the Overall System HMI Calculations area and the Customer-Defined Calculations heading.

stop_or_escalate_if: Escalate if the displayed HMI or training material does not show the documented Customer-Defined Calculations section.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: Training slide describing customer-defined calculation metrics in the Overall System HMI, including examples such as system, bin, and tipper statistics.

steps.title: Confirm the Customer-Defined Calculations heading
steps.purpose: Verify that the displayed content is the documented customer-defined calculations reference.
steps.instruction: Locate the 'Customer-Defined Calculations' heading and confirm the screen states that these are 'metrics calculated by the customer.'
steps.expected_result: The heading and descriptive statement match the documented source wording.
steps.healthy_condition: The displayed content includes the heading 'Customer-Defined Calculations' and the statement 'metrics calculated by the customer.'
steps.failure_condition: The heading or descriptive statement is missing, different, or not visible.

actions.label: Confirm heading text
actions.exact_action: Locate the 'Customer-Defined Calculations' heading and confirm the screen states that these are 'metrics calculated by the customer.'

The Overall System HMI includes a customer-defined calculations area for metrics calculated by the customer.

steps.title: Locate the Types of Calculations list
steps.purpose: Find the specific list that names the documented customer-defined calculation categories.
steps.instruction: Find the 'Types of Calculations' list on the displayed slide or screen.
steps.expected_result: The list of calculation types is visible.
steps.healthy_condition: A visible 'Types of Calculations' list appears under the Customer-Defined Calculations content.
steps.failure_condition: The list is not visible or cannot be read from the displayed source.

actions.exact_action: Identify the listed calculation categories as system statistics, bin statistics, and tipper statistics.

success_criteria: The user can identify the documented customer-defined calculation categories in the Overall System HMI as system statistics, bin statistics, and tipper statistics.
The category is recorded or communicated using only the documented source wording.

The displayed content states these are 'metrics calculated by the customer.'
The Types of Calculations list shows system statistics, bin statistics, and tipper statistics.
failure_conditions: The displayed HMI or training material does not show the documented Customer-Defined Calculations section.
The heading or list cannot be located or read.
Additional calculation types or meanings are inferred beyond the source.
escalation_guidance: Escalate if the displayed HMI or training material does not show the documented Customer-Defined Calculations section.
